title: Rotian's Netherite Tools
description: A full pixel-art redraw of Netherite tools and items, preserving the original silhouettes while improving material definition and consistency.
body:
# **Detailed Description**

- Netherite Redrawn is a visual rework of Netherite equipment focused on clarity, material readability, and internal consistency.
- The goal is not to redesign Netherite conceptually, but to redraw it with cleaner pixel clusters, more deliberate contrast, and a unified visual language across all items.
- All tools and items retain their vanilla proportions and immediately recognizable shapes. Changes are limited to pixel-level improvements:
- clearer edges
- reduced visual noise
- more consistent shading
- improved distinction between metal, edge, and handle materials
- The redraw avoids exaggerated highlights or stylization. Shading is kept restrained to remain compatible with vanilla lighting and existing texture packs.
- This pack is intended for players who want Netherite to look more refined without breaking the original Minecraft aesthetic.


## **Contents**

**This resource pack includes redrawn pixel-art textures for the following Netherite items:**
- Netherite Sword
- Netherite Pickaxe
- Netherite Axe
- Netherite Shovel
- Netherite Hoe
- Netherite Ingot

All listed items follow the same visual rules described above: preserved vanilla proportions, restrained shading, and consistent material definition.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![View of all Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30847ef2ef576b9613ba5a1646a33dc2270f1495_0.webp)

</details>


## **Features**

- Redrawn Netherite tools and items in pixel art
- Vanilla silhouettes preserved
- Improved shading and material separation
- Consistent style across the entire set
- No gameplay changes


## **Compatibility**

- Vanilla-friendly
- Works with default Minecraft lighting
- Should be compatible with most resource packs that do not override Netherite textures
- Installation
- Download the resource pack
- Place it in your resourcepacks folder
- Enable it from the in-game Resource Packs menu


## **License**

### **MIT License**

- This project is licensed under the MIT License.
You are free to use, modify, and redistribute this resource pack, including for commercial purposes, as long as proper credit is given and the license notice is included.

### **Notes**

- This project is purely visual. Feedback is expected to focus on readability, consistency, and pixel-level execution rather than design changes.
